data.title: Greatview Aseptic Units Launch SHIAC Arbitrations Tied to Divested International Business
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) is now available.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company has initiated arbitration proceedings through three subsidiaries at the Shanghai International Economic and Trade Arbitration Commission against entities connected to its divested international business. The actions follow earlier investigation findings and seek declarations that certain entrusted manufacturing and trademark licence arrangements are ineffective, alongside claims for the return of goods, deposits, fund occupation fees and damages totaling about RMB75.6 million.

The arbitrations, involving Greatview Shandong, Greatview Beijing and Greatview Holdings, target Wintipak units that had been counterparties under the restructuring-related contracts. SHIAC accepted the cases on 18 March 2026, and the company cautioned that outcomes and potential effects on its financial position and results remain uncertain, leaving investors and other stakeholders awaiting further updates as the disputes progress.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated supplier in the aseptic packaging industry, focusing on packaging materials and related services for liquid food and beverage producers. The company operates through mainland Chinese subsidiaries and has previously maintained an international business that was restructured and disposed of, leaving ongoing contractual and trademark relationships with entities linked to that divested arm.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$3.52B

data.title: Aveanna Healthcare Posts Strong Q4, Affirms 2026 Outlook
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Aveanna Healthcare Holdings ( (AVAH) ) is now available.

Aveanna Healthcare reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on March 19, 2026, with Q4 revenue rising 27.4% year over year to $662.5 million and net income jumping to $178.8 million, while adjusted EBITDA grew 54.0% to $85.0 million. For the full year ended January 3, 2026, revenue increased 20.2% to $2.43 billion, net income swung to a $225.0 million profit from a prior-year loss, and adjusted EBITDA surged 74.8% to $320.9 million, driven largely by growth in its private duty services segment.

The company maintained its 2026 guidance for revenue between $2.54 billion and $2.56 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $318 million to $322 million, signaling confidence in its core operations despite not yet factoring in its pending acquisition of Family First Homecare. Aveanna also highlighted solid liquidity and $131.0 million in free cash flow for 2025, although management noted that financing the Family First deal with cash and securitization borrowings is expected to reduce liquidity, underscoring an aggressive yet balance-sheet-conscious expansion strategy in pediatric home care.

The most recent analyst rating on (AVAH) stock is a Hold with a $8.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aveanna Healthcare Holdings stock, see the AVAH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AVAH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AVAH is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects weak financial foundation (high leverage and low profitability) and only modest technical momentum, partially offset by strong recent operating performance, raised guidance, and a mid-range valuation.

To see Spark’s full report on AVAH stock, click here.

More about Aveanna Healthcare Holdings

Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc., based in Atlanta and listed on Nasdaq, operates a diversified home care platform focused on medically complex, high-cost patient populations. The company delivers care primarily in the home across three operating divisions, including private duty services, home health and hospice, and medical solutions, and has been executing a multi-year strategic transformation with an acquisition-led growth strategy.

Aveanna’s model centers on high-quality, cost-effective in-home clinical care, positioning it within the pediatric and complex-care segment of the broader U.S. home care industry. Recent integrations, such as Thrive Skilled Pediatric Care, and expansion into multi-state pediatric home nursing reflect its emphasis on scaled, specialized services for vulnerable patient groups.

Average Trading Volume: 1,126,587

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.44B

data.title: Banco Santander Advances €2.14 Billion Share Buyback Programme
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Banco Santander ( (ES:SAN) ) has shared an announcement.

Banco Santander has provided an update on its ongoing share buyback programme, disclosing transactions in its own shares carried out between 12 and 18 March 2026 across several European trading venues. Over this period, the bank repurchased a total of 20,457,881 shares, as part of a wider programme approved by its board of directors earlier this year.

As of 18 March 2026, the total cash outlay under the buyback has reached €2.14 billion, representing about 42.6% of the programme’s maximum authorised investment. With these purchases, Santander has bought back roughly 16.5% of its outstanding shares since 2021, underlining its ongoing capital management strategy and signalling continued commitment to shareholder remuneration and balance-sheet optimisation.

More about Banco Santander

Banco Santander is a global banking group headquartered in Spain, operating across retail, commercial and investment banking, as well as consumer finance. The group focuses on core European and American markets, offering a broad range of financial services to individuals, small and medium-sized enterprises, and large corporates.

Learn more about SAN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Canadian Solar Posts Q4 Loss but Ramps Up U.S. Manufacturing and Energy Storage Backlog
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Canadian Solar ( (CSIQ) ) has provided an announcement.

Canadian Solar reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on March 19, 2026, highlighting 24.3 GW of solar module shipments and a record 7.8 GWh of energy storage shipments for the year, including strong U.S. volumes. Despite these operational milestones and a record $3.6 billion energy storage backlog, the company posted a Q4 2025 net loss of $86 million on $1.2 billion in revenue, as margins were hit by lower sales, project delays and impairments.

Management emphasized a strategic pivot from volume-driven growth to margin and storage-led profitability, backed by a $230 million convertible bond issuance to accelerate U.S. manufacturing and the creation of CS PowerTech to bring U.S. operations back under direct control. The fully ramped Mesquite, Texas module plant, planned expansion toward 10 GWp capacity, and the Jeffersonville, Indiana HJT cell facility targeting 6.3 GWp position Canadian Solar as a key player in North American supply-chain reshoring, even as it rebalances project development spending and manages a $6.5 billion debt load to support longer-term growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (CSIQ) stock is a Hold with a $19.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canadian Solar stock, see the CSIQ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CSIQ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CSIQ is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (sharp revenue decline, high leverage, and negative operating/free cash flow). Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below key moving averages and negative MACD. Offsetting these, the latest earnings call showed strength in energy storage and solid revenue execution, but cash burn, rising debt, and litigation risk keep the overall profile cautious.

To see Spark’s full report on CSIQ stock, click here.

More about Canadian Solar

Canadian Solar Inc. is a global solar and energy storage manufacturer and developer, supplying solar modules, battery storage systems and related power technologies to more than 70 countries. The company has an increasing strategic focus on the U.S. market, where it is reshoring manufacturing via its CS PowerTech platform, operating a large module plant in Texas and building a heterojunction solar cell factory in Indiana, while its Recurrent Energy unit develops and monetizes solar and storage projects worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 2,947,173

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.24B

data.title: GFL Clarifies No Perquisites for Chairman in Postal Ballot Notice
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from GFL Ltd ( (IN:GFLLIMITED) ) is now available.

GFL Ltd has issued a clarification to stock exchanges regarding its earlier postal ballot notice dated February 12, 2026, which sought shareholder approval for a special resolution. The company stated that its Chairman and Managing Director, Pavan Kumar Jain, will not receive any perquisites such as medical reimbursement or leave travel concession, signaling a tightening of executive benefit provisions and providing greater transparency to investors about management compensation.

The clarification, made under SEBI’s disclosure norms, is intended to ensure shareholders have accurate information when considering the special resolution proposed via postal ballot. By explicitly ruling out these specific perquisites for its top executive, GFL appears to be aligning executive pay practices with shareholder expectations and regulatory scrutiny, which may be viewed positively by governance-focused stakeholders.

More about GFL Ltd

GFL Ltd is an India-based listed company operating under the financial services classification, with its registered office in Mumbai and its shares traded on both the BSE and National Stock Exchange under the symbol GFLLIMITED. The company is led by Chairman and Managing Director Pavan Kumar Jain and is subject to SEBI’s listing and disclosure regulations as a publicly traded entity.

Average Trading Volume: 7,852

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 5.01B INR

data.title: Infinity Logistics Delays 2025 Results and Faces Trading Suspension After Auditor Change
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited ( (HK:1442) ).

Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited has warned that it will miss the 31 March 2026 deadline for publishing its audited annual results for the year ended 31 December 2025, after the late appointment of new auditor Nexia in February created additional time pressure for completing key audit procedures. The group says it is prioritising completion of the audit over issuing unaudited management accounts to avoid confusing shareholders and expects to release preliminary 2025 results on 9 April and dispatch its annual report by 30 April, with a board meeting scheduled for 9 April to approve the accounts and consider a final dividend.

As a consequence of the delay, trading in the company’s shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange will be suspended from 1 April 2026 and will only resume once the 2025 results are published, a move that temporarily restricts liquidity and heightens caution for investors. The board says it is not aware of any other material audit issues beyond the timing impact of the auditor change, but has urged shareholders and potential investors to exercise care in dealing in the company’s securities during the suspension period.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1442) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited stock, see the HK:1442 Stock Forecast page.

More about Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited

Infinity Logistics and Transport Ventures Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the logistics and transport sector through its group subsidiaries. The company provides logistics, freight and related transport services, positioning itself within regional and international supply chains for a broad base of customers.

Average Trading Volume: 42,222

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Innventure Files Shelf Registration to Streamline Stock Resales
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Innventure ( (INV) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 18, 2026, Innventure, Inc. filed a shelf registration statement on Form S-3 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to register the resale of its common stock by certain existing stockholders. The move consolidates three earlier Form S-1 resale registrations into a single S-3 filing, aiming to simplify compliance and streamline the resale process for already issued or contractually issuable shares.

The company emphasized that the filing does not involve new equity issuance or incremental dilution, as it covers shares that are outstanding or tied to previously issued, disclosed securities. Innventure will not receive proceeds from these secondary sales except in limited cases where it elects to issue shares under an existing standby equity purchase agreement or from cash warrant exercises, underscoring that the action primarily facilitates liquidity for current stakeholders rather than raising fresh capital.

The most recent analyst rating on (INV) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Innventure stock, see the INV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on INV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INV is a Neutral.

Overall score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (large losses, negative margins, and weak cash flow) and a bearish technical setup (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Positive corporate events around fundraising and debt reduction provide some offset, but valuation is difficult to support given ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on INV stock, click here.

More about Innventure

Innventure, Inc. operates as a publicly traded company focused on developing and scaling innovative ventures, using capital markets access to support growth and provide liquidity options for existing investors. Its shareholder base includes holders of previously issued common stock and convertible or exercisable securities governed by established contractual arrangements.

The share purchase, conducted on the London Stock Exchange and reported under regulatory requirements for persons discharging managerial responsibilities, underlines continued insider confidence in the consultancy’s prospects.
